subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! I call upon Thee by Thy Name through which Thou didst raise up the heavens upon the thread of Thine eternity and exalt them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی انادیک باسمک الذی اقمت السموات علی خیط ازلیتک و ارفعت
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for nearness to God, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih], @presence [liqa'] of Manifestation of God is presence of God
